content:
LIC Jeevan Labh (Plan 936) is one of the most practical endowment plans I recommend, especially for people who want to stop paying premiums early but continue receiving coverage and guaranteed returns for a longer period.

How Jeevan Labh works. You choose a policy term, 16, 21, or 25 years, but you only pay premiums for a shorter period: if you choose 16-year term, you pay for 10 years. If you choose 21-year term, you pay for 15 years. If you choose 25-year term, you pay for 16 years. At the end of the full policy term, LIC pays you the sum assured plus all accumulated bonuses.

Why is this structure attractive? Because your premium-paying years are fewer than the policy term, your annual premiums are higher than a regular endowment plan, but you enjoy the same coverage and maturity benefits for the full term. You effectively front-load your payments, stop early, and let the bonuses accumulate.

Actual numbers example: A 30-year-old takes ₹10 lakh sum assured with a 25-year policy term (16-year premium paying term). Annual premium approximately ₹48,000. Total premium paid over 16 years: ₹7.68 lakh. At maturity (age 55, end of 25 years), expected payout: ₹20 to ₹22 lakh (sum assured + bonuses). IRR approximately 5.5% to 6.5% per annum, tax-free.

Who is Jeevan Labh ideal for? Salaried professionals who want to clear their premium commitment in fewer years, for example, before retirement. People who expect income to reduce later in life. Self-employed individuals who have high income now and want to build a guaranteed corpus.

Jeevan Labh also provides life cover throughout the full policy term. If the policyholder passes away during any point in the 25-year term (including the 9 years after premiums stop), the full sum assured plus bonuses is paid to the nominee.

Bonus structure: Jeevan Labh participates in LIC's bonus pool (Simple Reversionary Bonus + Final Additional Bonus at maturity). Historically, LIC's bonus rate for endowment plans has been ₹40 to ₹55 per ₹1,000 sum assured per year, with terminal bonuses adding further.

For a personalised premium quote and maturity illustration for your age and sum assured, call me at 9415313434.

Use our free [Maturity Calculator](/calculators/maturity) to calculate your own numbers.
contentHi:
LIC जीवन लाभ (प्लान 936) वह एंडाउमेंट प्लान है जिसे मैं अक्सर उन लोगों को सुझाता हूं जो कम वर्षों में प्रीमियम भुगतान पूरा करके लंबी अवधि का कवरेज और रिटर्न पाना चाहते हैं।

जीवन लाभ कैसे काम करता है: आप एक पॉलिसी अवधि चुनते हैं, 16, 21, या 25 वर्ष, लेकिन प्रीमियम उससे कम वर्षों तक देते हैं। 25 वर्षीय पॉलिसी के लिए केवल 16 वर्ष प्रीमियम देना होता है। पूरी अवधि के अंत में LIC बीमा राशि + सभी संचित बोनस देती है।

वास्तविक उदाहरण: 30 वर्षीय व्यक्ति, ₹10 लाख बीमा राशि, 25 वर्षीय पॉलिसी (16 वर्ष प्रीमियम)। वार्षिक प्रीमियम लगभग ₹48,000। 16 वर्षों में कुल प्रीमियम ₹7.68 लाख। मैच्योरिटी पर अनुमानित भुगतान ₹20-22 लाख, पूरी तरह टैक्स फ्री।

जीवन लाभ के लिए आदर्श: वेतनभोगी पेशेवर जो सेवानिवृत्ति से पहले प्रीमियम भुगतान समाप्त करना चाहते हैं। स्वरोजगार व्यक्ति जो अभी अधिक आय करते हैं।

पूरी अवधि में जीवन कवर बना रहता है। 9415313434 पर कॉल करें, व्यक्तिगत प्रीमियम उद्धरण के लिए।
